creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thank you for you submission.

I also trimmed the Makefile header on this port. To make it standard I 
expanded your nick to your full name and email address in the Created 
by: name.

The rest of the patch is the same as yours.

Are you ok with the expanded name in Created by? The other option is to 
do without any Created by line and have just the $FreeBSD$ line.

Thanks again.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
